pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts which use this string for pre-task cleanup and post-task verification queries against the OpenProject database.
Verified against verifier.py which uses this string as the expected redirect URI to validate the database record.
Verified against setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which clear the file path at the start of the task and parse it for JSON content at the end of the task.

privileged_info_summary: The task specifies creating an OAuth application named 'Jenkins CI Pipeline' with the redirect URI 'https://jenkins.intranet.example.com/oauth/callback'. The agent must save the credentials to '/home/ga/jenkins_credentials.json'. These parameters are synthetic requirements, and code analysis confirms that the task setup, export scripts, and verifier all expect and evaluate exactly these values.
